basic_details.job_title: District Commissioner Bongaigaon Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District Commissioner Bongaigaon has officially released a notification for the recruitment of Administrative Officer Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate Degree in any discipline from a recognized University in India.
qualification.details: Administrative Officer: Graduate Degree in any discipline from a recognized University in India. At least 15 years of experience in any District Commissioner's establishment, with experience working in different branches, particularly in the Establishment Branch.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Band -3 of Rs. 22000/- -Rs. 97000/- & Grade Pay Rs.11,500/- PM plus other allowances
salary_details.details: Pay Band -3 of Rs. 22000/- -Rs. 97000/- & Grade Pay Rs.11,500/- PM plus other allowances

selection_process: Selection will be done by Government in General Administration Department as per the Assam Ministerial District Establishment Service Rules
1967 and the Assam Ministerial District Establishment service (Amendment) Rules 2009.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District Commissioner Bongaigaon Administrative Officer Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Administrative Officer post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Administrative Officer position is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Administrative Officer role?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Administrative Officer post, candidates must hold a Graduate Degree in any discipline from a recognized University in India.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Administrative Officer post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Administrative Officer in the District Commissioner Bongaigaon office.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the Administrative Officer position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Administrative Officer post is in Pay Band -3, ranging from Rs. 22,000/- to Rs. 97,000/- per month, with a Grade Pay of Rs. 11,500/- PM, plus other allowances.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Administrative Officer recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required experience for the Administrative Officer post?
faq.answer: Candidates need at least 15 years of experience working in any District Commissioner's establishment, with specific experience in various branches, especially the Establishment Branch.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Administrative Officer post?
faq.answer: The selection will be conducted by the Government in the General Administration Department, following the Assam Ministerial District Establishment Service Rules, 1967, and its amendment rules.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach attested copies of certificates, a recent passport-size photograph, and Annual Confidential Reports for the last 5 consecutive years with their application.
